creator: hgoqjfofgh@yahoo.co.jp
text:
The X Window System suddenly will be freezed. When I am using X with some applications, then some inputs cannot occured.
The X.org is provided by ports collection.
Exactly, for example, window manager's title bar is busy.
Even though mouse cursor is active.

Fix: 

Don't use X Window System.
How-To-Repeat: Install X to my PC.
